productDisplayName: Fastrack Men Black Grey Laptop Backpack
description: Fun, style and comfort are the highlights of this black and grey backpack from fastrack. Carry it to college or on a casual day out with your friends. A good looking bag with lots of space, it is sure to accommodate everything you think of, while you strut around looking super cool!Made of nylon for enhanced durabilityRoomy main compartment with a detailed organizerOne dedicated laptop compartment with a stretchable velcro fastener and a small zippered pocket to store the mouseMesh pocket to store the chargerTwo padded zippered pockets on the frontOne zippered pocket with stretchable fabric liningBrand name printed on the frontZippered pouch on the top with a rain coverDetachable wallet attached to the shoulder strapTwo zippered compartments attached to the strap to store essentialsBrand tab appliqued on the sideHaul loop for handling easePadded, adjustable shoulder straps that distribute weight evenly and protect the shoulders and back from injuriesMesh on the back and under the straps for improved ventilationErgonomic design to Fit along the torso comfortablyBranded zippers and sliders for easy use Nylon bonded thread for long lifeCareDo not machine washRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
